The personal information requested on this form is collected by the Ministry of Social Development and Poverty Reduction pursuant to sections 26(c) of the Freedom of Information and Protection of Privacy Act for the purpose of administering the Employment and Assistance Act and Employment and Assistance for Persons with Disabilities Act. If you have any questions about the collection, use or disclosure of this information, please contact the Ministry of Social Development and Poverty Reduction at 1-866-866-0800. # 1.
